feed.title: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, and Claude Skills Hub

entry.title: collab-audit
entry.content: 13-section AI collaboration audit — analyzes actual work patterns (not surveys) to generate behavioral profile, blind spots, and growth direction.

entry.title: goal-lock
entry.content: Agent discipline engine — locks the goal, enforces PLAN-DO-VERIFY-FINALIZE-OUTPUT loop, detects 11 success masquerading patterns.

entry.title: code-autopsy
entry.content: 12Q quantified code review — 4-axis scoring (Security/Stability/Robustness/Operability), severity anchors, deployment verdict, factuality gate. Works as standalone prompt in any LLM

entry.title: freeze
entry.content: Declare the editable zone — everything outside is frozen. Prevents scope creep during implementation by locking untouched files.

entry.title: pre-push
entry.content: Mandatory pre-push pipeline — secrets scan (12 patterns), build/test gate, lint, parallel AI code review. Blocks push on Critical/High findings.

entry.title: scope
entry.content: Define what is IN, what is OUT, and exit criteria before implementation. Quick mode (3 questions) or Full mode (layered spec with ADR).

entry.title: session-start
entry.content: Session opener — loads handoff from last session, reviews lessons learned, runs health check, outputs ready signal with priority action.

entry.title: project-check
entry.content: Scan existing project across 4 dimensions: Infrastructure, Security, Quality, Harness. Returns scored gaps ordered by severity.

entry.title: session-checkpoint
entry.content: Session closer — saves context before compact. Handoff file, memory updates, lesson extraction, reflexion (what went wrong, what to improve).

entry.title: setup
entry.content: Claude Code infrastructure and agent team setup — rules, hooks, memory system, routing, and agent installation in one guided flow.

entry.title: project-init
entry.content: Interview-based project scaffolding for Claude Code — generates CLAUDE.md, ROADMAP, .gitignore, and .env.example from decisions, not templates.

entry.title: win-customers
entry.content: Understand buyers, package value, create demand, and sell. Validate ICP, Grand Slam Offer, $100M Leads, Breakthrough Advertising, Conversation-First Outreach, Challenger Sale, JOLT Effect, and Key Person of Influence help win customers end-to-end.

entry.title: apple-mail
entry.content: Manage Apple Mail through natural language - read, search, send, and organize emails (macOS only)

entry.title: exarchos
entry.content: A local-first SDLC workflow harness — structured, durable state for coding agents, with convergence gates, agent teams, and full audit trail.

entry.title: obsidian
entry.content: Obsidian vault integration for Claude Code. Auto-capture git commit context, auto-save sessions via background claude CLI summarizer, export conversations, create/retrieve notes, and auto-organize content.

entry.title: pragmatic-dev-toolkit
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for the flat & pragmatic development workflow — workflow skills for alignment, execution and diagnosis; YAGNI/QA/security/doc/design reviewers; stack-aware test scaffolder (Python today); self-gated hooks; configurable path contract via CLAUDE.md.

entry.title: bench
entry.content: peerbench — a panel of AI reviewers (Codex + Kimi + GLM + Qwen + MiMo) for Claude Code: automatic gating reviews (plans, code turns, pushes), agentic read-only code review, and on-demand bug hunts. Commands are /bench:*.

entry.title: wire
entry.content: The Wire Framework — AI-accelerated data platform delivery for the full lifecycle: requirements, design, development, testing, deployment, enablement

entry.title: pi-stuff
entry.content: pi-stuff — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: posthog
entry.content: Access PostHog analytics, feature flags, experiments, error tracking, and insights directly from your AI coding tool. Optionally capture Claude Code sessions to PostHog LLM Analytics.

entry.title: agent-factory
entry.content: A Praxis-backed agent factory: a single-agent plan -> execute -> verify loop with compounding memory, delivered as Claude Code skills. Coding-first behind a general task+oracle seam.

entry.title: claude-workflow
entry.content: Workflow enforcement for Claude Code skills. Adds a Stop hook that blocks session completion until all defined workflow steps are finished.

entry.title: knowledge-skills
entry.content: Autonomous knowledge management skills for keeping AI context files up to date

entry.title: codeforge
entry.content: + CFP-2412 (2026-06-25) — whitelist↔manifest↔templates 3-way 일관성 CI gate 신설 (Epic CFP-2394 Story D, 최종): consumer-applicability 삼각 일관성(whitelist 28 ↔ templates/github-workflows/ ↔ manifest 49 closure) warning-tier CI gate. 방향1(whitelist→templates 실존 전수 miss=FAIL) + 방향2(manifest dep→whitelist subset) + 방향3(whitelist→manifest closure-asset 등재완전성, AM-3 run:-block-aware 추출) + depth-2(hard-exit 데이터 dep). graceful=data-absence 스크립트 EXIT 0(path-filter/on.paths skip 금지=required Pending trap 회피) + setup-error fail-closed exit 2. check_whitelist_manifest_3way.py Python SSOT(ReDoS-safe) + thin wrapper + .github single-root workflow(injection-safe pull_request) + 15 fixture discriminating test(mutation 생존 0). evidence-checks-registry 77→78 + label-registry-v2 v2.98→v2.99(hotfix-bypass:whitelist-manifest-3way 99 member). 신규 ADR 0(ADR-130 §결정3 closure ENFORCEMENT 적용). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.36.0 → 6.37.0 MINOR (신규 governance lint gate 활성화 = governance behavior, ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2408 (2026-06-25) — consumer-applicability full closure manifest 등록 (Epic CFP-2394 Story B): consumer-applicable workflow 의 full closure(scripts+데이터+정책doc)를 templates/consumer-scripts.manifest 에 등록(16→49 entry, additions-only). Check 4 확장자-인지 면제(.tsv 데이터/.mjs import-only ESM 의 exec-bit 면제 + 이중확장 .sh.tsv 류 strict 우선 방어) + 22 script git index mode +x normalize + 6 fixture mutation-kill. ADR-130 closure-완전성 규칙(§결정5-A 채널=templates/github-workflows) 적용. required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.35.0 → 6.36.0 MINOR (consumer 33 script 추가 배포 + Check 4 면제 runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2383 (2026-06-20) — spawn-prompt-fact-verify 게이트 mechanical wire (ADR-082 Amendment 37 §결정 1 layer 1 sub-scope 1-Z, sub-scope 1-L CFP-1590 carrier): worker→worker handoff spawn prompt PR-body-proxy 안 C1-C5 fact category (C1 counter / C2 version / C3 SHA / C4 verify-result / C5 file-existence) inherit fact 단언 시 동일-window [verified-via:] annotation presence lint (warning-tier). 4 sub-source inherit fact (사용자 발화 / sibling Issue body / sister PR commit message / 별 carrier retro file). 삭제된 1-W source (c84fadf3) C1-C5 PATTERNS 이식 + S2 (CFP-2382) issue-body-claim-pre-screen 구조 답습 (line-by-line in_fence toggle + strip_inline_code + PER_BLOCK_SCAN_CAP=50 + ANNOTATION_MARKER 정적 substring + exit 0=PASS/1=FLAG/2=SETUP) + PR-event trigger (pull_request opened/synchronize/reopened, tier-downgrade-guard.yml 선례 답습 — carrier workflow = spawn-prompt-fact-verify.yml). check_spawn_prompt_fact_verify.py Python SSOT (ReDoS-safe anchored bounded-quantifier regex, nested quantifier 0) + thin wrapper + .github single-root workflow + self-contained discriminating test. injection-safe (pull_request NOT pull_request_target / permissions contents:read,pull-requests:read / env-injection only — run inline 보간 금지, fork-PR shell injection 차단). PR-body-proxy 한계 명시 (실 spawn prompt 아닌 proxy, transcribe 케이스만 검출) → warning-tier advisory (위조 false-PASS 구조적 가능, 보안 통제 신뢰 금지). registry entry status deferred-followup → Active flip (current_tier:warning 불변) + label-registry-v2 v2.98 MINOR (hotfix-bypass:spawn-prompt-fact-verify 115번째 family member, 1-W name 충돌 회피). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.33.0 → 6.34.0 MINOR (신규 lint runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2382 (2026-06-20) — issue-body-claim-pre-screen 게이트 mechanical wire (ADR-082 Amendment 20 §결정 15, CFP-1559 carrier): orchestrator-authored followup Issue body 안 4 sub-pattern (PR state / CFP state / count / sister carrier) stale-claim 을 동일-line [verified-via:] annotation presence 로 write-time pre-screen (warning-tier). Wave 1 declarative anchor(CFP-1559)의 Wave 2 wire. check_issue_body_claim_pre_screen.py Python SSOT (line-by-line in_fence toggle masking + inline code-span strip — fenced 내부 빈줄 fragmentation 0, ReDoS-safe anchored regex) + thin wrapper + .github single-root workflow (on:issues opened/edited, R1 scope predicate = codeforge-improvement AND (type:improvement OR title [CFP-FU/[CFP][FU), story-init.yml 답습) + self-contained discriminating test (23 TC, mutation 생존 0). count enum 한글 확장 (건/개/곳/줄/회/어휘 — ordinal-모호 번/항목/차례 제외, FP 보수) + 구조화 FLAG message (pattern/line/claim/hint). registry entry status deferred-followup → Active flip (current_tier:warning 불변). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.32.0 → 6.33.0 MINOR (신규 lint runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2381 (2026-06-20) — deferred-followup reconcile 게이트 (ADR-060 Amendment 18 §결정 32): §결정 19 auto_blocking 라벨의 mechanical forcing function 신설. '임계 초과 + auto_blocking + 전용 carrier 부재' evidence-checks-registry entry 자동 검출 + 강제 action 3택 (배선/강등/폐기, warning-tier). carrier-부재 = detect_command OR workflow 경로 파일 ABSENT (닫힌집합 + fail-loud 경로추출, status-agnostic broad criterion, 2-root parity). self-validation test job (다형 fixture mutation 생존 0) + STALE 2 status flip (bootstrap-labels-precondition + schema-change-7-principles-self-check) + 16번째 registry self-entry. required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.31.0 → 6.32.0 MINOR (신규 lint runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2377 (2026-06-20) — 완료 단계 정식화 (ADR-128 + ADR-040 Amd9 + ADR-045 Amd13): merge 직후 wrap-up 을 정식 '완료 단계' 로 격상. (갭 A) backstop GC 자동 트리거 복원 = hooks.json SessionEnd async dispatch 단일 wire (hooks/session-end → check-worktree-stale.sh background GC, 문서-실배선 drift 복원 — SessionStart async 무시·동기 지연 회귀라 배제, 트리거 단일화 invariant = Stop 동시 wire 금지) + phase:완료 worktree-clean self-check 신규 (scripts/check-worktree-completion-clean.sh, eager 미실행 검출 게이트, F2 sub-worktree vs Story root mergedAt 구분 계약, fail-safe 4종 상속, warning-tier + workflow:null local-only — required CI 불가). (갭 B) 4-트리거 (post-merge-followup / retro-mandatory / GitOpsAgent eager / phase:완료) 수렴 SSOT = playbook §9.7.2 명문화 (신규 SSOT 0, 클라우드↔로컬 비대칭 = 절차+텔레메트리 조합). (갭 C) Living Architecture / Confluence mirror 재정합 = 유예 (ADR-112/111 owner pointer). 신규 lane 0 / required check 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-024 Amd19 §B 정합) / process-skip 채널 0 (ADR-127 ratchet 정합). 6.30.0 → 6.31.0 MINOR (SessionEnd hook 신규 + 완료-게이트 기능). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). Claude Code 범용 SW 개발 오케스트레이션 플러그인. 0 core 에이전트 (wrapper-only) · 8 레인 + CI gate + role:dev 동적 roster 로 요구사항 접수부터 배포 리뷰 통과까지 자율 실행

entry.title: Titan
entry.content: Pensar, fazer e passar o bastão: cinco skills chamáveis individualmente. planejar (metodologia completa pra desenhar produto/software novo do zero antes de codar), auto-think (modo largar-e-esquecer pra ESTUDAR um problema difícil — pesquisa, estuda de vários ângulos, confronta os achados com o Codex, verifica e entrega uma ou mais soluções com veredito; não executa), auto-worker (modo largar-e-esquecer em que o Claude EXECUTA a tarefa e o Codex confronta o trabalho antes de fechar, com protocolo de segurança e verificação embutido), handoff (gera documento de passagem de bastão pra continuar o trabalho numa sessão nova do zero) e gpt-optimizer (revisor adversarial on-demand via Codex GPT-5.5 que te faz refletir sobre uma decisão no meio da conversa — o GPT tenta derrubar, advogado do diabo; sem precisar de plano, PR ou código formal; quando o veredito é Seguir, oferece executar com a auto-worker). A auto-think estuda e recomenda; quem executa a solução escolhida é a auto-worker. A planejar pode, no fim, oferecer disparar a auto-worker pra executar o plano — opcional, nunca automático. Repo-agnóstico — serve pra qualquer projeto.

entry.title: skill-governance-archive
entry.content: Archived 2026-04-27. Point-in-time experiment in Claude skill governance. See README for lessons learned and recommended replacements (Cisco skill-scanner, plugin distribution, Anthropic enterprise controls).

entry.title: whitebox-testing
entry.content: White-box testing skill with path coverage, cyclomatic complexity, decision-path analysis, dataflow path coverage, and test generation for Python/JS/Java/C.

entry.title: ui-ux-pro-max
entry.content: UI/UX design intelligence. 84 styles, 161 palettes, 73 font pairings, 25 charts, 17 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt.js, Nuxt UI, Svelte, Astro, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Jetpack Compose, Angular, Laravel, JavaFX, Three.js). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient.

entry.title: teacher-operating-system
entry.content: Teacher Operating System (TOS): a hub-and-spoke ecosystem of governed K-12 teacher skills that generate, validate, differentiate, route, and maintain educational artifacts. Skills under skills/ are auto-discovered; shared engines (standards, context, connectors, students, records, docintel, routing, traversal, health) provide the governed core. Offline/stdlib; decision-support with human_review_required; placeholders only in the repo.

entry.title: writing
entry.content: Opinionated writing skills for Obsidian, tuned for cryptography and mathematics

entry.title: piflow
entry.content: Pi Flow — author, enhance, and run structured filesystem-coordinated workflows (a DAG of producer/verify nodes) as a fleet of efficient pi agents driven by non-Claude coding-plan models, with Claude Code as the single console. Three skills: piflow-init (create a workflow), piflow-enhance (improve it), piflow-start (run + monitor it).

entry.title: korean-dart
entry.content: OpenDART 83개 API → 15개 MCP 도구. 금융감독원 전자공시(DART) 기반 AI 리서치 — 공시 검색·재무·XBRL + 버핏 애널리스트 프레임(insider_signal · disclosure_anomaly · buffett_quality_snapshot) + HWP/PDF 첨부 마크다운화

entry.title: rapid-sustainability-risk
entry.content: Rapid Sustainability Risk Assessment (RSRA / Aris) — embed energy transition and decarbonization analysis directly into real estate acquisition underwriting. Produces a phased Decarb Plan, Energy & Emissions Profile, Deal Signal, and targeted Seller Questions from any OM, PCA, or ESG DD report.

entry.title: goldfish
entry.content: Cross-client MCP memory with checkpoints, recall, briefs, and standups for AI-assisted development

entry.title: svaha
entry.content: Claude Code that picks up exactly where it left off — frozen cross-session handoffs, a self-watching context budget, coherence guardrails, and an optional operator decision layer.

entry.title: data-liberation
entry.content: Extract content from closed web platforms (GoDaddy Websites & Marketing, Hostinger, HubSpot, Shopify, Squarespace, Webflow, Weebly, Wix) into WordPress-compatible WXR files. Inspect, extract, QA, and import to WordPress.

entry.title: iterm2-tab-status
entry.content: Show iTerm2 tab status (running/idle/attention) for Claude Code sessions

entry.title: claude-code-statusline
entry.content: Multi-provider statusline for Claude Code — DeepSeek ¥ tracking, opencode go subscription usage, Anthropic context bar. TrueColor gradient, git porcelain, code churn.

entry.title: devkit
entry.content: Local-dev coordination skills for devkit: file locks, ports, dev servers, issue lifecycle

entry.title: visual-planner
entry.content: Browser-reviewable, iterable planning for Claude Code and Codex. Generate a plan as a local markdown file, review it in a polished browser UI, leave comments, and iterate revision-by-revision with visual diffs.

entry.title: shippo
entry.content: Ship packages with Shippo. Multi-carrier rate shopping, label generation, package tracking, address validation, customs declarations, and batch processing from CSV files.

entry.title: open-skills
entry.content: 开放技能库：工作流、性能优化、Jira、Git 等 Claude Code Skills

entry.title: code-quality-atlas
entry.content: A research-derived suite of 33 code-review and maintenance skills covering correctness, readability, structure, security, performance, tests, migrations, accessibility, observability, LLM and agentic/tool-use safety, install/upgrade experience, authored-artifact conventions (e.g. SKILL.md), and repo-wide audits (architecture, dependencies, config, docs, compliance), plus a router that picks the right lenses for a given change or design doc and a synthesizer that merges their findings into one ranked verdict. Each skill is generated from a verified research atlas with provenance, refined examples, and cross-model evals.

entry.title: sealos
entry.content: Deploy local or GitHub projects to Sealos Cloud, connect cloud databases and S3 object storage, generate Dockerfiles and Sealos templates, assess cloud-native readiness, and build Sealos Desktop apps.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: greennode-agentbase
entry.content: Full GreenNode AgentBase lifecycle: scaffold → configure → deploy → monitor → teardown. 10 skills including /agentbase-wizard, /agentbase-deploy, /agentbase-monitor.

entry.title: harness-claude
entry.content: Harness for Claude Code — skills, /harness:* slash commands, persona subagents, lifecycle hooks, and MCP tools without per-repo `harness setup`. Sibling plugins exist for Cursor, Gemini CLI, and Codex.

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: javascript-typescript
entry.content: JavaScript and TypeScript development with ES6+, Node.js, React, and modern web frameworks

entry.title: vd
entry.content: A daily-driver collection of skills for agentic coding, namespaced under `vd:` to avoid conflicts with other plugins.

entry.title: last30days
entry.content: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

entry.title: gemini-manager
entry.content: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.

entry.title: token-optimizer
entry.content: Audit, fix, and monitor Claude Code context window usage. Find the ghost tokens.

entry.title: ap
entry.content: Multi-model tmux pane orchestration for Claude Code — spawn codex/claude/agy/opencode TUIs as attachable parts

entry.title: stride-ideation
entry.content: Turn a fuzzy idea into a committed requirements doc and Stride tasks via two slash commands — /stride-ideation:ideate and /stride-ideation:stridify.

entry.title: ax
entry.content: ax - the agent experience layer. Local graph of every Claude Code + Codex session, skill invocation, edit, and commit. Surfaces what to use, what to ground on, and which experiments to package next.

entry.title: trtc-agent-skills
entry.content: TRTC AI Integration Assistant - helps developers integrate Tencent Real-Time Communication SDKs (Chat, Call, RTC Engine, Live, Conference) across Web, Android, iOS, Flutter, and Electron.

entry.title: prism
entry.content: Whole-repo code navigation (the prism-mcp server) plus defect-focused diff slicing, packaged for coding agents. Pre-wires the prism MCP server to the current project and ships two Agent Skills (prism-code-navigation, prism-code-slicing) that teach an agent when and how to use them.

entry.title: beagle
entry.content: Code review skills and verification workflows for Python, Go, React, and AI frameworks

entry.title: code-refactoring
entry.content: Code cleanup, refactoring automation, and technical debt management with context restoration

entry.title: browser-harness
entry.content: Direct browser control via CDP. Drives the user's real Chrome (or a Browser Use cloud browser) with coordinate clicks, screenshots, and a Rust-native CLI — no selector hunting. Requires the one-time `browser-harness` Rust CLI install (see the skill's references/install.md).

entry.title: axis-human-ai-toolbox
entry.content: A collection of AI-powered tools and utilities

entry.title: llm-application-dev
entry.content: LLM application development with LangGraph, RAG systems, vector search, and AI agent architectures for Claude 4.6 and GPT-5.4

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: rag-reviewer
entry.content: Agentic PR review: hybrid RAG + code graph via MCP, review skills for Claude Code

entry.title: code-documentation
entry.content: Documentation generation, code explanation, and technical writing with automated doc generation and tutorial creation

entry.title: obsidian-vault-autopilot
entry.content: AI-powered vault autopilot — sorts, renames, tags, and enriches your Obsidian notes automatically.

entry.title: solid-coder
entry.content: Plugin with skills/workflows using solid principles

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entry.title: ai-maestro-janitor
entry.content: Session-scoped janitor: reconciles PRs, worktrees, TRDDs, tasks; nudges to commit often, act on subagent reports, and never leave work stale; handles rate-limit auto-resume and prompt-cache keep-alive via a single durable CronCreate heartbeat. No external daemons.

entry.title: skim
entry.content: Keyboard-driven TUI for code reviews - AI agent integration

entry.title: markdown-vault-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for markdown vaults: FTS5 + semantic search, link graph, write/edit/git.

entry.title: comprehensive-review
entry.content: Multi-perspective code analysis covering architecture, security, and best practices

entry.title: onchainos-skills
entry.content: onchainos-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: zensu
entry.content: Product Lifecycle Manager — Features as First-Class Citizens

entry.title: switchboard
entry.content: Cross-team communication, devcontainer orchestration, and tool proxying for agent teams. Provides crosstalk, dispatch, connector, and evie-bot bridge tools via MCP.

entry.title: farty-bobo
entry.content: Opinionated Claude Code skills, hooks, and commands. Use /farty-bobo:install to selectively install what you want without cloning the whole repo.

entry.title: tdd-workflows
entry.content: Test-driven development methodology with red-green-refactor cycles and code review

entry.title: distillery
entry.content: Knowledge base skills for Claude Code — capture, search, and synthesize project knowledge

entry.title: habit
entry.content: Intelligent prompt inventory. Observes, captures, and evolves reusable prompts into a living collection.

entry.title: remember
entry.content: Continuous memory for Claude Code. Extracts, summarizes, and compresses conversations into tiered daily logs. Claude remembers what you did yesterday.

entry.title: jfrog
entry.content: Official JFrog plugin. Connect Claude Code to JFrog to manage, secure, and govern your software supply chain. Give agents the context to build secure, compliant software.

entry.title: workflows
entry.content: Development, data science, writing, and workshop presentation workflows with TDD enforcement, output-first verification, agent team parallelization, and GSD-style deviation rules, test gap validation, and session handoff.

entry.title: thumbgate
entry.content: One 👎 becomes a hard rule the agent cannot bypass. Captures thumbs-down feedback, distills it into PreToolUse Pre-Action Checks, enforced across every future Claude Code session.

entry.title: workflow
entry.content: Plan, execute, and review workflow skills for Claude Code

entry.title: loom
entry.content: Loom — meta-orchestration platform for Claude Code. Plans, executes, reviews, and tests software changes with multi-agent pipelines, hook-enforced contracts, and a pull-on-demand library.

entry.title: cloudbase-ai-toolkit
entry.content: Tencent CloudBase MCP Server - AI-powered development toolkit for building and deploying full-stack applications, mini-programs, and cloud functions to Tencent CloudBase platform

entry.title: setup-eval
entry.content: Evaluate AI agent setups for best practices, redundancy, security, and cross-component issues.

entry.title: dash0-agent-plugin
entry.content: OpenTelemetry observability for Claude Code sessions. Captures tool calls, LLM invocations, token usage, and errors as OTel traces.

entry.title: yana-ai
entry.content: Personal agent operating system for Claude Code. Safety hooks, memory tiers, agents, commands, and cross-engine hard enforcement.

entry.title: work-cycle
entry.content: Structured plan-to-ship development workflows with explicit checkpoints

entry.title: systems-programming
entry.content: Systems programming with Rust, Go, C, and C++ for performance-critical and low-level development

entry.title: datarobot-agent-skills
entry.content: DataRobot skills for AI/ML workflows — model training, deployment, predictions, feature engineering, monitoring, explainability, data preparation, App Framework CI/CD, and external agent monitoring.

entry.title: booskills
entry.content: Agent-skill catalog with 16 skills and 12 agent personas for code review, investigation, architecture, planning, research, refactoring, UI building, frontend critique, and model routing.

entry.title: claude-code-notify
entry.content: macOS desktop notifications with sound and voice alerts for Claude Code. This repo also ships dedicated adapters for Codex, OpenCode, and Pi.

entry.title: escapement
entry.content: Host-neutral agentic workflow layer: beads issue tracking, oracle-discipline gates, TDD enforcement, and outcome-bias continuation. Always-on rules are injected via a SessionStart hook.

entry.title: board-of-directors
entry.content: Strategic decision framework with 10 director archetypes (Musk, Altman, Hassabis, Li, Nadella, Huang, Pichai, Hoffman, Ng, Jobs) and 7 shared methodology skills. Orchestrated via /board or invoked per director. Not a substitute for professional advice.

entry.title: swe-workflow-security
entry.content: Skills for security audits, dependency/CVE management, blast-radius analysis, and incident handling.

entry.title: swe-workflow-em
entry.content: Skills for planning, estimation, metrics, retros, proposals, reviews, and steering reviews and incidents.

entry.title: swe-workflow-ml
entry.content: Skills for ML pipelines, experiment tracking, model deployment, and the data/observability around them.

entry.title: agent-skills-golang
entry.content: AI Agent Skills for production-ready Go projects

entry.title: llm-wiki-capture
entry.content: Capture knowledge into denote-mono's denote llm-wiki using durable source packets and the ingest CLI.

entry.title: position
entry.content: Tools for Portfolio position monitoring & reconciliation on the ayunit MCP. Reads v_AccountPosition (book of record), reconciles against v_CustodyPosition (broker snapshot), and manages v_AssetCustody (custody↔asset mapping) — quantity/cost reconciliation, missing-asset detection, and lifecycle of custody identifiers.

entry.title: vibecode
entry.content: Skills do fluxo vibecode (gerar app, design e fases MVP/HOM/PROD) para projetos criados a partir do vibe-template.

entry.title: swe-workflow-backend
entry.content: Skills for service, API, and data work: design, test-first implementation, performance, and shipping.

entry.title: swe-workflow-designer
entry.content: Skills for user flows, accessibility, product requirements, and the frontend architecture that realizes them.

entry.title: swe-workflow-pm
entry.content: Skills for proposals, PRDs/specs, estimation, OKRs/metrics, retrospectives, and strategic reviews.

entry.title: commit-craft
entry.content: Write clear, conventional git commit messages from your staged changes.

entry.title: engineering
entry.content: Engineering utilities and helpers for software development tasks.

entry.title: plugin-forge
entry.content: ObjectCore meta-plugin: scaffolds new plugins and their catalog entries via a spec-driven pipeline. (Stage 1 skeleton.)

entry.title: tutor
entry.content: Adaptive tutor skill with 10 teaching modes, active teaching tools, and a browser-based visual companion — runs code, creates exercises, generates interactive diagrams, quizzes, and walkthroughs. Makes Claude act as an interactive coach for learning any subject.

entry.title: meta-generator
entry.content: ObjectCore meta-plugin: generates new meta-plugins (generators and governance plugins) from an archetype — the factory replicating itself.

entry.title: plugin-validator
entry.content: ObjectCore meta-plugin: governs plugin and marketplace correctness — the hard-rule checklist plus the validate + eval gate.

entry.title: account-transaction
entry.content: Portfolio.AccountTransaction tools on the ayunit MCP. Custody activity loaders (UBS Miami, Morgan Stanley, BTG Offshore/Cayman) parse the export/API feed and insert validated trades + cash/GL movements with live asset/account/lock resolution. Plus batch fixers: duplicate-trade-reconcile (removes restated/double-loaded trades against Portfolio.CustodyPosition, lock-aware) and compromissada-fix (normalises XP repos onto the cash-like convention, pair-consistent and lock-gated).

entry.title: crew
entry.content: An AI dev team behind one /crew:pm command. A PM triages each request and routes it through specialist roles (architect, dev, tester, reviewer, debugger, security, docs, release), tracking everything in a feature tracker + todo list, and enforcing the coding standards you enable.

entry.title: swe-workflow-architect
entry.content: Skills for structural decisions, documentation, contracts, blast radius, and technical-debt strategy.

entry.title: requirements
entry.content: Skill para criar requisitos com boas praticas (EARS, INVEST, criterios de aceite) e registra-los como regra para o Claude.

entry.title: hello-objectcore
entry.content: Minimal demo plugin proving the ObjectCore derive + validate pipeline end to end.

entry.title: swe-workflow-strategy
entry.content: Skills for pre-public and strategic reviews: vision and positioning, market analysis, execution-vs-roadmap, and go/no-go synthesis.

entry.title: insforge
entry.content: The backend platform for AI-native developers. A Postgres-based backend with auth, storage, compute, hosting, and AI gateway — built for coding agents. This plugin gives agents the full InsForge surface: database CRUD with RLS, authentication, storage, edge functions, AI, realtime, Stripe payments, and deployments. Includes CLI infrastructure management, debugging diagnostics, and integration guides for third-party auth providers (Auth0, Clerk, Kinde, Stytch, WorkOS).

entry.title: swe-workflow-qa
entry.content: Skills for test-first development, coverage strategy, test data, review, and systematic debugging.

entry.title: swe-workflow-frontend
entry.content: Skills for UI/UX, component architecture, accessibility, and client-side performance.

entry.title: swe-workflow-devops
entry.content: Skills for CI/CD, containers, infrastructure-as-code, delivery, observability, and incidents.

entry.title: marketplace-builder
entry.content: ObjectCore meta-plugin: governs the catalog build — derive marketplace.json from the plugin graph through the single deriveCatalog seam, validate, and keep it in sync.

entry.title: guestway-docs
entry.content: Ask Claude about Guestway: product modules, the 57 integrations and their live status, pre-sales FAQs, and Academy how-to docs. Connects to the public, read-only Guestway Docs MCP server (no login).

entry.title: productivity
entry.content: Productivity helpers for administrative and daily tasks.

entry.title: cc-tuner
entry.content: Tune Claude Code's own configuration. Ships claude-md-writer (audit CLAUDE.md / .claude/rules/ memory against the official docs) and a usage statusline (rate-limit + context %, /cc-tuner:statusline-setup). Plus /execute-task, a gated task-lifecycle playbook (requires superpowers + cc-codex-triage).

entry.title: release-manager
entry.content: ObjectCore meta-plugin: governs plugin releases — the Changesets-driven version, {plugin}--v{semver} tagging, SHA-pinned catalog publishing, and build-provenance/attestation flow.

entry.title: misc
entry.content: Miscellaneous utility skills for common Claude Code tasks.

entry.title: xenodot
entry.content: Xenodot Forge — agents, skills, tools and hooks for AI-assisted Godot-family (Godot / Redot / Blazium) game development with Claude Code

entry.title: vault-mind
entry.content: Learning-first skills for an Obsidian (or any Markdown) knowledge vault: quiz, Feynman, Socratic argument drilling, gap-finding, link-surfacing, grounded Q&A. The AI never writes your notes for you; it makes you think. Run /vault-mind:init once to profile your vault.

entry.title: point-marketing
entry.content: Internal Point marketing skills for brand voice, copywriting, and content review.

entry.title: bento
entry.content: Bento multi-tenant knowledge platform — 33 OAuth-authenticated MCP tools (Spaces, ReBAC permissions, tenancy, citation-backed Knowledge Base) plus skills that teach Claude to drive them.

entry.title: professor-synapse
entry.content: Professor Synapse — a router that summons expert agents on demand, with persistent agent-tagged memory and a summon-gate that keeps work on-persona. Your own agents and memory live in the plugin's data dir and survive updates.

entry.title: sdlc
entry.content: Software development lifecycle — git, PRs, code review, security.

entry.title: scepter
entry.content: SCEpter knowledge-graph workflow for Claude Code: the spec/claim authoring skills and the sce-* agents. Pairs with the @wayspurrchen/scepter CLI, which ships the `scepter` binary separately via npm.

entry.title: graphiti-memory
entry.content: 基于 Graphiti MCP 服务器的持久化知识图谱记忆。教 AI 智能体安全地读、写、验证和删除图记忆(情节 → 实体 → 事实)—— 钉死 group_id、没验证过不说成功、按层选对工具。当用户想记住、回忆或管理跨会话的长期记忆时使用。

entry.title: footgun
entry.content: Footgun — mehrstufige, JavaScript-spezifische Code-Review-Kette (Tooling-Gate, 5 parallele Reviewer, Aggregator mit Verdict).

entry.title: memini
entry.content: Persistent memory for AI coding agents via the memini memory service. 6 hooks, MCP tools, and skills that capture tool usage and inject prior context at session start.

entry.title: imperion-skills
entry.content: Imperion CRM domain-contract skills (Graph access, MSP sources, vector contract, code review, minimal-code discipline, ...). Canon lives in the ImperionCRM repo per ADR-0060; sibling repos and all agent clones consume it via the imperion marketplace.

entry.title: angularjs-lsp-plugin
entry.content: AngularJS 1.x Language Server for Claude Code - provides go-to-definition, find references, hover, completion, and diagnostics for AngularJS projects

entry.title: turso
entry.content: Manage Turso Cloud (organizations, databases, groups) from your AI agent via the hosted Turso MCP server.

entry.title: agent-deck
entry.content: Complete guide for managing AI coding agent sessions via agent-deck CLI - session lifecycle, MCP management, groups, profiles, and automation

entry.title: research
entry.content: Structured research workflow for source selection, fact checking, and evidence-backed summaries.

entry.title: ems
entry.content: Claude Code plugin surfacing the ems agent harness — run, inspect, and watch harness pipelines from slash commands.

entry.title: pulse-skills
entry.content: Public JoomPulse agent skills for product research and marketplace workflows.

entry.title: copilot-agent-toolkit
entry.content: Governance toolkit for AI-assisted software delivery with GitHub Copilot. Bundles custom agents (implementation, security review, DevOps, architecture, UX), agent skills (Azure pricing and cost, CodeQL, Dependabot, diagrams, GTM, and more), and MCP servers (Microsoft Docs, Azure, GitHub, Playwright, draw.io).

entry.title: ergo
entry.content: Local-first AI code review in your terminal. Review diffs, apply fixes, and expose review tools to Claude via MCP. Bring your own Codex/ChatGPT subscription or API key.

entry.title: farthershore
entry.content: Build and operate a product on the FartherShore platform: Product-as-Code authoring, plans & billing, environments & releasing, frontend hosting, backends & tokens, and day-2 operations. Skills live in skills/.

entry.title: agent-cache-optimizer
entry.content: Claude Code companion for cache-friendly agent prompts, local optimizer status, and prompt-cache guidance.

entry.title: design-skills
entry.content: Design-system-agnostic AI skills for design work inside a product's own codebase: explore art directions, prototype, and review. Each skill discovers and respects the project's real tokens, components and conventions.

entry.title: double-shot
entry.content: Take a plan/design doc all the way to a built, tested, reviewed product in two phases — plan→blueprint, then blueprint→build-to-green — with a human feedback gate between. A skill orchestrates two bundled workflows.

entry.title: anything-llm-plugin-claude
entry.content: Plugin de Claude para enviar documentos, JSON, imágenes y URLs a AnythingLLM vía su API.

entry.title: forward-deployed-selling
entry.content: Operating doctrine for AI-era enterprise sales. Use when an agent works on accounts, deals, outreach, coaching, or pipeline — any revenue-affecting decision.

entry.title: agent-kevin
entry.content: Portable, file-based personal AI assistant. Compiles raw sessions into a queryable wiki, manages tasks across project lifecycles, drives SEO/web tools (GSC, PageSpeed, SerpAPI, headless browser, web search), and ships 20+ skills covering onboarding, daily/weekly/monthly cadences, audits, and content workflows. All data stays as local markdown + YAML.

entry.title: js-mastery-teacher
entry.content: A Socratic JavaScript teaching system with specialist agents (JS Mentor, Async Wizard, Code Reviewer, Test Engineer, Junior Mentor), practice skills, slash commands, and guided learning tools. Based on the JavaScript Mastery roadmap.

entry.title: manifest-it
entry.content: Ergonomic-fix grab bag for the Claude Code substrate. Bundles: (1) vision bridge — text-only models auto-describe images instead of dead-ending on 'model does not support vision'; (2) image-gen bridge — routes image generation to gpt-image-2; (3) ForceLink — Stop hook that blocks turns ending with bare file paths, forcing clickable URLs; (4) a sanitized, distilled operating-ethos CLAUDE.md (a16z/Garry Tan hybrid). A shipping manifest of small substrate fixes.

entry.title: salvage
entry.content: Start over, simpler — recover the real requirements from a project that went down a bad path and emit a portable spec to rebuild on the simplest maintainable stack.

entry.title: escapement
entry.content: Host-neutral agentic workflow layer: beads issue tracking, oracle-discipline gates, TDD enforcement, and outcome-bias continuation for Claude Code sessions.

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: riskified
entry.content: Riskified developer tools for Claude Code — automates beacon fraud-detection integration into merchant storefronts

entry.title: forger
entry.content: Dezessete skills de Claude Code (PT-BR) que levam o dev solo da ideia ao deploy E melhoram projetos que já existem: onboarding guiado (start, stack, design, setup, roadmap, next, status, ops), auditoria de projeto existente (audit) + fila .forge/BACKLOG.md, avanço-automático gated (loop) e o ciclo de engenharia (context, brainstorm, plan, coding, fix, ship) + help. Projeto novo? /dev-start. Já existe? /dev-audit. Depois é só 'executa o passo 0X'.

entry.title: umans-vision-handoff
entry.content: Adds a view_image tool that hands images to a native-vision Umans model (Kimi first, then fallbacks) for providers like GLM 5.2 whose vision is via-handoff only.

entry.title: saas-development
entry.content: Stack-aware skills and hooks for FastAPI + Next.js SaaS projects deployed to Railway

entry.title: greenfield
entry.content: Build and customize a production-ready agent workflow from scratch, or audit and upgrade your existing projects.

entry.title: rladies-skills
entry.content: A composing suite of Agent Skills distilling the R-Ladies guide (guide.rladies.org) into on-demand guidance for the community and global team: apply the R-Ladies brand and voice, write and translate blog posts, draft and schedule social media, coordinate abstract review, run chapters and events, and maintain the website the R-Ladies way.

entry.title: image2editable
entry.content: Convert images, screenshots, and design drafts into editable PPTX presentations or layered PSD files.

entry.title: design-system
entry.content: The @efounders design-system toolbox skills: assess a project (ds-audit), set up its design system (ds-bootstrap), and sync Figma from the code (ds-figma). Companion to the design-skills plugin.

entry.title: codevista
entry.content: Local, zero-runtime-dependency visual plans and recaps. The agent writes a compact Markdown-superset file; a bundled Node server renders it as a rich, interactive, commentable view in the browser — entirely on 127.0.0.1, no MCP, no network.

entry.title: edator
entry.content: Record once. Claude makes the edit decisions, FFmpeg executes them. An AI co-producer that cuts your raw footage into a finished video — deterministically.

entry.title: loop-engineer
entry.content: Loop engineering wizard for Claude Code. Answer 3 questions and Claude orchestrates a maker/verifier agent loop until your goal is met.

entry.title: agentic-council
entry.content: Convene 20 agentic specialists on your hardest engineering problems. Distinct perspectives, unified design, actionable plans, every decision tracked. Ships sibling councils for finance, people, and revenue under their own slash commands.

entry.title: sig
entry.content: Disciplined AI development workflow integrating GSD's execution orchestration, Agent Skills' quality enforcement, and patterns from the broader Claude Code plugin ecosystem — with a project-complexity calibration router that right-sizes rigor per project tier. Slash-command prefix: /sig:* (Signal is the project brand; sig is the namespace).

entry.title: exa
entry.content: Exa AI web search, deep research, and content extraction. Provides MCP tools and research skills for comprehensive web search, people discovery, company research, academic papers, and more.

entry.title: cowork-plugin-management
entry.content: Create, customize, and manage plugins tailored to your organization's tools and workflows. Configure MCP servers, adjust plugin behavior, and adapt templates to match how your team works.

entry.title: zeromind
entry.content: ZeroMind MCP plugin: ZeroMind content discovery (zeromind.search/inspect/install/engage — find, reuse, review, and vote on published worlds + assets) plus world list/create/launch/connect and engine tools (execute, guides, capture, VFS, bash) routed to the WASM engine in your browser. Bundled skills teach Claude to check ZeroMind first and drive Zero worlds. REQUIRES Node.js 18+ — if you see 'status failed', install Node from https://nodejs.org and restart Claude Code.

entry.title: github-release
entry.content: Generate categorized release notes for any GitHub repo and optionally publish them as a GitHub Release. Conventional-commit aware, monorepo-friendly, with a hard publish-confirmation gate.

entry.title: dream
entry.content: Memory consolidation for Claude Code. Simulates the Auto Dream feature by auditing, deduplicating, and rebuilding your memory files.

entry.title: apple-photos
entry.content: Query and export from the macOS Apple Photos library via osxphotos - search by date/album/keyword/person, list albums and folders, fetch metadata, and export originals or edited photos (macOS only)

entry.title: recall
entry.content: Durable, fully-local project memory for Claude Code. Logs every session to .recall/history.md and condenses it into .recall/context.md with a local Python summarizer (TF-IDF + TextRank) — no API key, no external model, nothing leaves your machine. New sessions resume from the saved context.

entry.title: ai-devkit
entry.content: Make AI coding agents follow a repeatable engineering workflow with memory, verification, skills, and multi-agent setup

entry.title: usap-skills
entry.content: Unified Security Agent Platform — 79 cybersecurity skills + 12 cs-* orchestrator agents that emit a typed 11-field JSON output contract, mapped to MITRE ATT&CK and NIST CSF 2.0. Runs in any LLM. Bundles 7 slash commands (usap:run, usap:fortigate, usap:orchestrate, usap:challenge, usap:compare, usap:test, usap:README) and 6 user-invocable orchestrator skills (Alex, CISO, DevSecOps, Incident Responder, Program Manager, Red Team).

entry.title: truto
entry.content: Official plugin for Truto -- the unified API platform. Helps developers integrate with third-party tools using Truto's APIs.

entry.title: local-issue
entry.content: Local docs/issue/ tracker as a set of low-cost-model sub-commands (write/list/read/update/migrate). Keeps issue CRUD, index maintenance, and VCS commit out of the main session context.

entry.title: factory
entry.content: Autonomous coding pipeline: converts GitHub PRD issues into merged pull requests with quality-first review gates

entry.title: agents
entry.content: Specialist sub-agents for AI-assisted development.

entry.title: chaos-substrate
entry.content: Persistent code knowledge memory with MCP tools for indexing, querying, feature context, change-plan decomposition over a layered feature hierarchy, feature explanation pages, and client-facing interactive feature guides (Access-Control-style scrollytelling with real-UI previews and an end mini-game).

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Universal agentic skill library for Claude Code with 1,254+ reusable skills across coding, security, design, product, and operations workflows.

entry.title: ironlabs
entry.content: AI video production skills — creative direction, generation, editing, and e-commerce content

entry.title: visualcave
entry.content: Generate interactive technical diagrams as standalone HTML files. Powered by Mermaid.js. Supports flowcharts, sequence diagrams, ER diagrams, class diagrams, state machines, timelines, mind maps, git graphs, pie charts, and quadrant charts. Dark mode, step-through reveal, and export built in.

entry.title: ywc-agent-toolkit
entry.content: YWC skill distribution toolkit for Claude Code — 26 skills covering planning, commits, PR creation, spec writing, code review, security audit, and development workflows

entry.title: dominicode-sdd-creator
entry.content: Spec-Driven Development, adaptación de Dominicode — genera spec.md + plan.md + tasks.md (TDD) antes de escribir código.

entry.title: silver-bullet
entry.content: Agentic Process Orchestrator for AI-native Software Engineering & DevOps. Provides SB-owned lifecycle workflows, optional extension-plugin boundaries, and layered technical compliance.

entry.title: monskills
entry.content: Skills for developing apps on Monad. Assists LLM with frontend, smart contract deployment, and deploying to production

entry.title: volcengine
entry.content: Skills for Volcengine (火山引擎) scenarios: cloud resource operations (ECS/VPC/VKE/CLB/RDS/Redis/TOS), deployment, IaC, and SDK code generation.

entry.title: carta-cc
entry.content: Maps, connects, and remembers your documentation. Structural scanning, LLM semantic audit, Qdrant embedding, and semantic search.

entry.title: cc-native
entry.content: Keep Claude Code feature-aware against weekly releases: feature-guide skill, edit-time reminder + lint + audit for .claude/ artifacts.

entry.title: clinpub
entry.content: End-to-end clinical data analysis and publication pipeline for SCI Q1/Q2 journals. Reads CSV/XLSX data, runs R-based statistical analysis, generates publication-grade figures, searches literature (PubMed), writes IMRAD manuscripts, and simulates peer review.

entry.title: harness
entry.content: Personal Claude Code harness — pipeline orchestration, specialized agents, and engineering-discipline hooks.

entry.title: agent-webbridge
entry.content: Clean-room, open-source (MIT) browser automation for AI agents. Drives the user's real Chrome with its live login sessions across multiple Chrome profiles in parallel — and, unlike typical browser bridges that share one global current tab, attaches chrome.debugger per tab so N tabs in one profile run concurrently. No closed-source dependency, no account, no telemetry.
